title: Star Wars (2015) 46
content:
{{Top|rwm|aor|title=''Star Wars'' (2015) 46}} {{Otheruses|Star Wars 46}} {{ComicBook |image=[[File:Star_Wars_46.jpg]] |title=''Star Wars'' 46 |writer=[[Kieron Gillen]] |penciller=[[Salvador Larroca]] |inker=Salvador Larroca |letterer=[[Clayton Cowles]] |colorist=[[Guru-eFX]] |cover artist=*[[David Marquez]] *[[Matthew Wilson]] |editor=[[Jordan D. White]] |publisher=[[Marvel Comics]] |release date=[[April 4]], [[2018]]{{Marvel|url=comics/issue/66699/star_wars_2015_46|text=Star Wars (2015) #46}} |pages=23 |upc=759606081134 |timeline=[[1 ABY]]''[[Star Wars: Timelines]]'' dates the events of ''[[Star Wars Book X: Mutiny at Mon Cala]]'' to [[1 ABY]]. |series=[[Star Wars (2015)|''Star Wars'' (2015)]] |issue=46 }} '''''Star Wars'' 46''' is the forty-sixth issue of the [[Marvel Comics|Marvel]] [[Star Wars comic books|comic book]] series [[Star Wars (2015)|''Star Wars'']]. It was written by [[Kieron Gillen]] and illustrated by [[Salvador Larroca]] and was released on [[April 4]], [[2018]]. ==Publisher's summary== ''The Rebellion continues their mission to liberate Mon Cala! Princess Leia has a nearly impossible plan to unite the planet with the Rebel Alliance, one that counts on the unique skills and cultural know-how belonging to the one-and-only…C-3PO?!'' ==Opening crawl== {{OpeningCrawl |name=Part III
MUTINY AT MON CALA |text=It is a period of rebuilding in the galaxy. Rebel leaders Princess Leia, Luke Skywalker, and Han Solo continue the search for a new base of operations as they fight against the Galactic Empire's tyrannical reign. Recently, Leia has tried to convince the leader of the Imperial-occupied planet Mon Cala to join their cause — to rebel against the corrupt government that kidnapped their king so many years ago. But Grand Admiral Urtya has refused to send his fleet to join the Rebellion for fear of further punishment for his people. In a time calling for desperate measures, Leia convinces the Rebellion leaders to let her run their most dangerous mission yet. It's time to rescue the Mon Cala king....}} ==Plot summary== Aboard the [[Millennium Falcon]], Leia, Luke, and Han Solo are with the rescued [[Clawdite]], [[Tunga Arpagion]]. Leia explains that Tunga is a famous shape-shifter with a reputation for impersonating people so well that he once played a dead actress for a week without anyone noticing. She tells Tunga that they need him to impersonate Moff Tan Hubi for just a few hours. When Tunga expresses concern about impersonating the Moff on duty without access to his files, Leia reassures him that all he needs to do is sit through a five-hour opera. She appeals to his ego, suggesting that a successful deception of this magnitude would make him even more famous. On Mon Cala, the rebels watch as the Moff arrives at the [[Moncaladrome]]. They implement their plan: the droids, R2-D2 and C-3PO, are smuggled in with catering to drug the Moff's drink, allowing Han and Chewbacca to grab him. They manage to subdue the Moff, but he wakes up during the transfer to Tunga. The rebels escape with the Moff in a submersible Mon Cala vehicle and travel to the water planet of [[Strokill Prime]], where the ultra-secure prison is located just below the surface. After inputting the access codes and bio-marker, they crash into the ocean. The Moff warns them that the planet has its own defenses, and a massive monster fish immediately confronts them. ==Media== {{Mediacat|from=1|imagecat=Images from Star Wars (2015) 46}} ===Editions===
